title: User humidifier comfort preferences and device status
summary: The user prefers 50% or higher ambient humidity for comfort, permits automatic re-activation attempts after prior failed activations, and their Mijia Smart Anti-bacterial Humidifier 2 still has persistent connection or functional issues that consistently prevent successful automatic activation.
